title: hieracium saxatile subsp. coriifolium
intro: Hieracium saxatile subsp. coriifolium, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium saxatile subsp. coriifolium include its potential to treat various ailments, such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
